# go-term benchmark baseline
# go test -bench=. -count=10 -benchmem ./term
# Each line: Name  NsPerOp  BytesPerOp  AllocsPerOp
BenchmarkVisualReorder_FullRow 17090 22552 69
BenchmarkVisualReorder_AllLTR 1646 1504 2
BenchmarkSixel_Decode 23491 49344 5
BenchmarkGrid_InsertLines 2660 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_DeleteLines 2144 0 0
BenchmarkResize_Reflow_DeepScrollback 31678345 90451216 31155
BenchmarkGrid_ScrollUpRegion_FullScreen 1765 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_ScrollDownRegion_FullScreen 2296 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search 89696 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search_LargeScrollback 12777 24 1
BenchmarkParserFeed_PlainText 106816 0 0
BenchmarkParserFeed_SGR 50468 0 0
BenchmarkScrollback_EnsureGeom 388051 2893312 4
BenchmarkForegroundPass 68789 0 0
